decisions.rationale: Full remediation across critical, high, and medium
Move from inline settings.json to scripts/. Maintainable, testable, debuggable
Tests run during /review and /verify-ci. Pre-commit adds 10-120s for marginal value
Same pattern as CODEOWNERS. Warn and skip, user merges manually
Pure analysis agents don't need shell. Reduces attack surface
Close Read hook bypass via cat/head/tail/grep on sensitive files
Shared load_json/repo_root/write_json. All scripts import from it

constraints: install.sh must remain single portable script
Hook extraction must not change user-facing behavior
Deny patterns use prefix matching — document limitations
